messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## File Storage

### File System

```hcl
resource "oci_file_storage_file_system" "fs" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-file-system"
  availability_domain = "aaaa:US-ASHBURN-AD-1"
  metered_by_bytes = true
}
```

### Mount Target

```hcl
resource "oci_file_storage_mount_target" "mt" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name   = "my-mount-target"
  availability_domain = "aaaa:US-ASHBURN-AD-1"

  subnet_id = oci_core_subnet.private_subnet.id
}
```

### Export

```hcl
resource "oci_file_storage_export" "export" {
  file_system_id = oci_file_storage_file_system.fs.id
  mount_target_id = oci_file_storage_mount_target.mt.id

  export_options {
    source = "0.0.0.0/0"
    access = "READ_WRITE"
  }
}
```

### Mount

```bash
mount -t nfs $IP:/$EXPORT_PATH /mnt
```
